title: Crate Header and Bootstrap Production Contract

included: version triple read (major, minor, patch) from 3 discrete bytes
5 unused header bytes read without validation
8B reserved bootstrap field read without validation
version-range acceptance for major 0, minor 8 through 12
feature-gating diagnostics for value types introduced at minor 10 or later
deferred: Crate versions with major != 0 or minor < 8 or minor > 12

magic.validation: exact match required before any further reads

version_triple.validation: each byte read discretely; the version word must not be read as a single uint64 because that conflates the version triple with the unused bytes

unused.validation: read but not validated; nonzero values must not cause rejection (§16.3.8.1: 'recommended to be zero value bytes, but are not required to be so currently')
unused.preservation: implementations should preserve these bytes for any future round-trip use

toc_offset.value: unsigned 64-bit little-endian byte offset from the start of the file to the table of contents
toc_offset.validation: must be less than the file size and must allow the table of contents to lie within the payload

reserved.validation: read but not validated; nonzero values must not cause rejection (§16.3.8.3)
reserved.preservation: implementations should preserve these bytes for any future round-trip use

structural_feature_baseline.compressed_toc: all accepted versions (minor >= 4) require LZ4-compressed table-of-contents reads
structural_feature_baseline.compressed_int_arrays: all accepted versions (minor >= 5) support compressed (u)int and (u)int64 arrays
structural_feature_baseline.compressed_float_arrays: all accepted versions (minor >= 6) support compressed float arrays
structural_feature_baseline.64bit_array_sizes: all accepted versions (minor >= 7) write array sizes as unsigned 64-bit integers

feature_gates.minor_lt_10: all required Crate value types and sections used by AOUSD 1.0.1 readers must be decoded
feature_gates.minor_ge_10: the version triple must be accepted; value types introduced at minor 10 or later (Splines, Relocates, PathExpression) may emit UnsupportedUsdcFeature diagnostics rather than be decoded

version_policy.rejection: version triples with major != 0, minor < 8, or minor > 12 produce UnsupportedUsdcVersion before any section interpretation

laws: magic, version triple, and bootstrap are read in order from a non-owning byte view; an owned copy of the opened payload must not be made

version triple bytes are read discretely; reading the version word as a single uint64 and comparing against a literal is a contract violation because it conflates the version triple with the unused header bytes
unused header bytes and reserved bootstrap bytes must be tolerated for any byte values
validate_header must produce InvalidUsdcHeader for non-PXR-USDC magic and UnsupportedUsdcVersion for out-of-range version triples before any section interpretation runs
the table-of-contents offset must fit within the opened payload; integer overflow in the offset arithmetic is an error
this contract owns header and bootstrap byte layout only; it must not interpret section bytes or value representations
golden_groups: valid PXR-USDC headers across the accepted version range
invalid magic and out-of-range version diagnostics
nonzero unused header bytes and nonzero reserved bootstrap bytes are accepted
table-of-contents offsets outside the payload produce a clear diagnostic
0.10.0+ version triples are accepted but value-decoder feature gates apply
